result.stdout:
Simple Bookmark Console Application.

Usage:  [command]

Commands:
  add    add bookmark.
  cd     change directory from bookmarking path.
  clear  clear bookmarks.
  clip   clip bookmark.
  get    get bookmark.
  list   show bookmarks.

Simple Bookmark Console Application.

Usage:  [command]

Commands:
  add    add bookmark.
  cd     change directory from bookmarking path.
  clear  clear bookmarks.
  clip   clip bookmark.
  get    get bookmark.
  list   show bookmarks.
